ideal_playbook.opening_line: Good morning, Dr. Sharma. I'd like to share a brief 3-slide overview of CardioMax — a peer-reviewed study showed 34% better LDL reduction vs. standard care in patients matching your profile.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Present the JUPITER trial data showing CardioMax efficacy in the 50-65 age cohort — exactly the segment you see most.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Compare side-effect profile vs. competitor: CardioMax has 40% fewer GI complaints in the same cohort.
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — highest evidence base for analytical prescribers, two published RCTs.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Would you be open to reviewing a one-pager on CardioMax before our next visit?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Patel, I won't take more than two minutes — I just wanted to leave one data point with you that's changed how some of your peers in cardiology are approaching statin resistance.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Don't push for a prescription today — simply plant the seed: 'Doctors with similar patient loads found this useful for their statin-resistant segment.'
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Acknowledge the most common objection upfront: 'I know you're already using Rosu-X — this is for the subset where it underperforms.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — position as a niche add-on, not a replacement.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Is there a 5-minute slot in your next month where I could show you one patient case study?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Mehta, last visit you asked about the mechanism of action — I brought the full pharmacokinetic comparison you requested.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Walk through the head-to-head comparison chart: CardioMax vs. Rosu-X on efficacy, onset, and tolerability.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Tie to their patient profile: 'For your diabetic hypertensives, CardioMax's renal safety data is particularly relevant.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — lead with clinical comparison data, not brand messaging.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Shall I leave a sample pack for 3 patients so you can compare outcomes firsthand?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Rao, I remember you mentioned a patient last visit who was struggling with adherence — I thought of him when I read this case study.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Share the patient story: 62-year-old diabetic hypertensive who switched to CardioMax and halved his pill burden, improving adherence by 60%.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Ask: 'Do you have patients in a similar situation where a once-daily option could make a real difference?'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — frame around patient outcomes and reduced pill burden.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Would it help to trial CardioMax with just two or three of those patients and compare their adherence logs next visit?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Joshi, you've seen the data — let's talk about making CardioMax the first-line choice for your LDL-resistant segment.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Summarise in 30 seconds: 'CardioMax — best-in-class LDL reduction, once daily, lowest GI burden. You've already seen the data.'
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Offer the path of least resistance: 'I can have a 30-day sample delivered to your clinic by Friday.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — get the prescription commitment today, not next visit.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Can I put you down for a trial prescription for your next 5 LDL-resistant patients?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Krishnamurthy, the real-world outcomes data from the 1,200-patient registry study just published — I know you've been waiting for this.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Present the registry data: 'In patients matching your profile, CardioMax showed 31% lower MACE events at 24 months vs. standard care.'
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Address the remaining hesitation: 'I know cost was a concern — here's the formulary coverage update for your district.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax — real-world evidence is the final piece for evidence-driven prescribers.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: With the registry data and formulary update, what would you need to start a trial prescription this week?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Nair, thank you for your continued confidence in CardioMax — let's make sure your patients keep getting the best of it.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Reinforce success: 'Your patients on CardioMax are showing 28% better adherence than the district average — you're ahead of the curve.'
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Introduce the complementary product: 'NervaQ pairs well with CardioMax for your diabetic neuropathy patients — same once-daily convenience.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: NervaQ — upsell for the diabetic complication segment already trusting the brand.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Which 3 patients on CardioMax do you think would benefit most from adding NervaQ?

ideal_playbook.opening_line: Dr. Pillai, I've been thinking about the patient you mentioned last visit — the one who finally got her LDL under control. That's the kind of outcome that makes this work worthwhile.
ideal_playbook.talking_point_1: Celebrate the win together: 'Your patients on CardioMax are doing well — I'd love to collect one of their success stories for our clinical newsletter, if you're open to it.'
ideal_playbook.talking_point_2: Introduce loyalty program: 'We're starting a patient adherence support program — free pill organisers and SMS reminders for your CardioMax patients.'
ideal_playbook.product_focus: CardioMax adherence programme — deepen loyalty and patient outcomes.
ideal_playbook.closing_question: Would you like to nominate 5 patients for the adherence support programme to launch next month?
